Part.Source:
If &WizardData.Mdfe.MDFeCod <> 0 For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, MDFeCod Where EmpCod = &WizardData.Mdfe.EmpCod WHere FilCod = &WizardData.Mdfe.FilCod Where MDFeCod = &WizardData.Mdfe.MDFeCod
MDFeNum = &WizardData.Mdfe.MDFeNum MDFeSer = &WizardData.Mdfe.MDFeSer MDFeProt = &WizardData.Mdfe.MDFeProt MDFeChv = &WizardData.Mdfe.MDFeChv MDFeSts = &WizardData.Mdfe.MDFeSts MDFeDtaEnc = &WizardData.Mdfe.MDFeDtaEnc MDFeHorEnc = &WizardData.Mdfe.MDFeHorEnc MDFeEncUfeCod = &WizardData.Mdfe.MDFeEncUfeCod MDFeAdc = &WizardData.Mdfe.MDFeAdc MDFeTipEmt = &WizardData.Mdfe.MDFeTipEmt MDFeModCod = &WizardData.Mdfe.MDFeModCod MDFeTipMod = &WizardData.Mdfe.MDFeTipMod MDFeDtaEms = &WizardData.Mdfe.MDFeDtaEms MDFeHorEms = &WizardData.Mdfe.MDFeHorEms MDFeDtaSai = &WizardData.Mdfe.MDFeDtaSai MDFeHorSai = &WizardData.Mdfe.MDFeHorSai MDFeTipTra = &WizardData.Mdfe.MDFeTipTra
MDFeOriUfeCod = &WizardData.Mdfe.MDFeOriUfeCod // MDFeCarCidCod = &WizardData.Mdfe.MDFeCarCidCod MDFeLotCarCep = &WizardData.Mdfe.MDFeLotCarCep
MDFeDstUfeCod = &WizardData.Mdfe.MDFeDstUfeCod MDFeDesCidCod = &WizardData.Percurso.MDFeDesCidCod MDFeLotDesCep = &WizardData.Mdfe.MDFeLotDesCep
If MDFeRNTRC.Trim().IsEmpty() MDFeRNTRC = &WizardData.Modal.MDFeRNTRC EndIf If not &WizardData.Percurso.MdfeSegRes.IsEmpty() and &WizardData.Mdfe.MDFeTipEmt = MDFe_TipoEmitente.Prestador Do 'GravaSeguro' EndIf Exit EndFor
For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, MDFeCod,MDFeCarCod Where EmpCod = &WizardData.Mdfe.EmpCod WHere FilCod = &WizardData.Mdfe.FilCod Where MDFeCod = &WizardData.Mdfe.MDFeCod Where MDFeCarCod = 1 MDFeCarCidCod = &WizardData.Mdfe.MDFeCarCidCod Exit EndFor
Else UltimoCodigoEmpresa.Call(domParCod.MDFE, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &MDFeCod) &newMDFENum = 0 If not &WizardData.Mdfe.MDFeNum.IsEmpty() and &WizardData.Mdfe.MDFeNum = 0 &ParCod = domParCod.MDFENUM &newMDFENum = &WizardData.Mdfe.MDFeNum do 'atualizaPARMempresa' EndIf
New EmpCod = &EmpCod FilCod = &FilCod EmpCod = &WizardData.Mdfe.EmpCod FilCod = &WizardData.Mdfe.FilCod MDFeCod = &MDFeCod MDFeNum = &newMDFENum MDFeSer = &WizardData.Mdfe.MDFeSer MDFeProt = &WizardData.Mdfe.MDFeProt MDFeChv = &WizardData.Mdfe.MDFeChv MDFeSts = &WizardData.Mdfe.MDFeSts MDFeDtaEnc = &WizardData.Mdfe.MDFeDtaEnc MDFeHorEnc = &WizardData.Mdfe.MDFeHorEnc MDFeEncUfeCod = &WizardData.Mdfe.MDFeEncUfeCod MDFeAdc = &WizardData.Mdfe.MDFeAdc MDFeTipEmt = &WizardData.Mdfe.MDFeTipEmt MDFeModCod = &WizardData.Mdfe.MDFeModCod MDFeTipMod = &WizardData.Mdfe.MDFeTipMod MDFeDtaEms = &WizardData.Mdfe.MDFeDtaEms MDFeHorEms = &WizardData.Mdfe.MDFeHorEms MDFeDtaSai = &WizardData.Mdfe.MDFeDtaSai MDFeHorSai = &WizardData.Mdfe.MDFeHorSai MDFeTipTra = &WizardData.Mdfe.MDFeTipTra MDFeRNTRC = &WizardData.Modal.MDFeRNTRC MDFeAveSts = Status_Nfe.Digitando
MDFeOriUfeCod = &WizardData.Mdfe.MDFeOriUfeCod // MDFeCarCidCod = &WizardData.Mdfe.MDFeCarCidCod MDFeLotCarCep = &WizardData.Mdfe.MDFeLotCarCep
MDFeDstUfeCod = &WizardData.Mdfe.MDFeDstUfeCod MDFeDesCidCod = &WizardData.Percurso.MDFeDesCidCod MDFeLotDesCep = &WizardData.Mdfe.MDFeLotDesCep EndNew commit
//JDF ValidaNroMdfe.call(&EmpCod, &FilCod, &MDFeCod)
New MDFeCarCod = 1 MDFeCarCidCod = &WizardData.Mdfe.MDFeCarCidCod EndNew commit
If not &WizardData.Percurso.MdfeSegRes.IsEmpty() and &WizardData.Mdfe.MDFeTipEmt = MDFe_TipoEmitente.Prestador Do 'GravaSeguro' EndIf Endif
Sub 'atualizaPARMempresa' For Each Order EmpCod, ParFiLCod, ParCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where ParCod = &ParCod Where ParFiLCod = &FiLCod ParUltCod = &newMDFENum Exit EndfOR EndSub
Sub 'GravaSeguro' For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, MDFeCod,MdfeSegCod Where EmpCod = &WizardData.Mdfe.EmpCod WHere FilCod = &WizardData.Mdfe.FilCod Where MDFeCod = &WizardData.Mdfe.MDFeCod Where MdfeSegCod = 1 MdfeSegRef = &WizardData.Percurso.MdfeSegRef MdfeSegRes = &WizardData.Percurso.MdfeSegRes MdfeSegNom = &WizardData.Percurso.MdfeSegNom MdfeSegCnpj = &WizardData.Percurso.MdfeSegCnpj MdfeSegNroApo = &WizardData.Percurso.MdfeSegNroApo
When none New EmpCod = &WizardData.Mdfe.EmpCod FilCod = &WizardData.Mdfe.FilCod MDFeCod = &WizardData.Mdfe.MDFeCod MdfeSegCod = 1 MdfeSegRef = &WizardData.Percurso.MdfeSegRef MdfeSegRes = &WizardData.Percurso.MdfeSegRes MdfeSegNom = &WizardData.Percurso.MdfeSegNom MdfeSegCnpj = &WizardData.Percurso.MdfeSegCnpj MdfeSegNroApo = &WizardData.Percurso.MdfeSegNroApo EndNew
commit EndFor
// //averbações // For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, MDFeCod,MdfeSegCod // Where EmpCod = &WizardData.Mdfe.EmpCod // WHere FilCod = &WizardData.Mdfe.FilCod // Where MDFeCod = &WizardData.Mdfe.MDFeCod // Where MdfeSegCod = 1 // Where MdfeSegNroAve = &WizardData.Percurso.MdfeSegNroAve // MdfeSegQCTXml = &WizardData.Percurso.MdfeSegQCTXml // When none // New // EmpCod = &WizardData.Mdfe.EmpCod // FilCod = &WizardData.Mdfe.FilCod // MDFeCod = &WizardData.Mdfe.MDFeCod // MdfeSegCod = 1 // MdfeSegNroAve = &WizardData.Percurso.MdfeSegNroAve // MdfeSegQCTXml = &WizardData.Percurso.MdfeSegQCTXml // EndNew // EndFor EndSub
